task_completion.description: Open the Weasis DICOM node configuration interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis application is open and the Preferences or DICOM Node configuration dialog is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Description for the DICOM node
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Regional_Partner_PACS' is visible in the 'Description' field of the DICOM node configuration.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct AE Title for the DICOM node
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'REGIONAL_ARCHIVE' is visible in the 'AE Title' (or AET) field of the DICOM node configuration.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Hostname/IP for the DICOM node
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '10.99.50.200' is visible in the 'Hostname' or 'IP' field of the DICOM node configuration.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Port for the DICOM node
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '11112' is visible in the 'Port' field of the DICOM node configuration.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the configuration to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool or terminal command is used to capture the configuration window, or a file named 'pacs_node_config.png' is visible on the Desktop or in the file manager at ~/Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Weasis application GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration values are entered into the genuine Weasis DICOM configuration dialog, not a text editor, terminal, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent applied or saved the configuration in Weasis
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks an 'Add', 'OK', 'Apply', or 'Save' button in the Weasis interface after entering the node details.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely captured a screenshot of the interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a screenshot utility (GUI or CLI) to capture the screen, rather than renaming an existing image or creating a fake file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected DICOM node configuration is: Description: 'Regional_Partner_PACS', AE Title: 'REGIONAL_ARCHIVE', Hostname/IP: '10.99.50.200', Port: '11112'. The screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/pacs_node_config.png'.
